mission.title: opentelemetry-operator: Finalizer in the open telemetry collector CustomResource prevents successful namespace deletion when managed operator is uninstalled prior to CustomResource uninstall/deletion
mission.description: Finalizer in the open telemetry collector CustomResource prevents successful namespace deletion when managed operator is uninstalled prior to CustomResource uninstall/deletion. This issue affects 14+ users.

steps.title: Identify opentelemetry-operator troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your opentelemetry-operator deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n opentelemetry-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-operator
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-operator -n opentelemetry-operator --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review opentelemetry-operator configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant opentelemetry-operator configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n opentelemetry-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-operator
kubectl get configmap -n opentelemetry-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opentelemetry-operator
```
When opentelemetry operator and Custom Resource(operand) installed separately, whenever OpenTelemetry Collector custom resource( CR) gets created/modifies, the opentelemetry collector controller adds the finali

steps.title: Apply the fix for Finalizer in the open telemetry collector CustomResource…
steps.description:
- Add finalizers to CR only when cluster roles and bindings for SA are created by Operator
- Caused by #2938

<Issue number if applicable>

- Resolves: #4367
```yaml
> kubectl get ns

NAME                          STATUS        AGE
default                       Active        6h31m
gke-managed-cim               Active        6h29m
gke-managed-system            Active        6h29m
gke-managed-volumepopulator   Active        6h29m
gmp-public                    Active        6h28m
gmp-system                    Active        6h28m
kube-node-lease               Active        6h31m
kube-public                   Active        6h31m
kube-system                   Active        6h31m
foo                        Terminating   6h28m

> kubectl describe ns/foo

Name:    
```

steps.title: Confirm Finalizer in the open telemetry collector… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-operator -n opentelemetry-operator --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n opentelemetry-operator --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
- Add finalizers to CR only when cluster roles and bindings for SA are created by Operator
- Caused by #2938

<Issue number if applicable>

- Resolves: #4367

default                       Active        6h31m
gke-managed-cim               Active        6h29m

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with opentelemetry-operator installed or the issue environment reproducible.
